content.full_text:
August 23, 1976

Mr. Dick Bryant  
Campaign Reporting Department  
County of Los Angeles  
808 North Spring Street  
Los Angeles, California 90012

Dear Mr. Bryant:

This letter is to confirm my advice to you by telephone on August 18, 1976.

Our Legal Division has determined that copies of campaign statements filed pursuant to the Political Reform Act do not have to be conformed. Filers who inquire, however, should be encouraged to fill in on copies the information contained in the verification section of the original campaign reports.

Sincerely,

Nan Hambleton  
Special Compliance Representative

NH:bw

bcc: Jeanne P.
